Method *

extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web or Agent/Workflow designer with an API workflow named Workflow.json open. In the canvas, an If branch is configured so the Else path calls the tool/action "UiPath Orchestrator GetProcessJobs," and the right properties panel displays that action's configuration. The selected action is set to use a UiPath Orchestrator connection with GET method, a Request URL filtering Orchestrator jobs by process name and start date, plus headers, query parameters, and an output variable.
step_instructions: Select the "UiPath Orchestrator GetProcessJobs" activity in the Else branch to edit its settings.
In the "UiPath Orchestrator connection" field, confirm or select the "UiPath Orchestrator" connection.
In the "Request URL" field, enter or verify the OData jobs query that filters by $context.variables.ProcessName and $context.variables.StartDate.
In the "Headers" section, add or verify the header { "X-Requested-By": "UiPath-ApiWorkflow" }.
In the "Query parameters" section, add or verify the parameters { "skip": 10, "limit": 10 }.
In the "Output" field, map the result to "$context.outputs.OrchProcessJobsList".

layout.rationale: High density (1302 chars) + wide (2.18) or very high text
